arts.ttl: Hull City's next three games will be acid test of summer transfer strategy
arts.sum: In those three wins against opposition, you'd expect to be towards the bottom half of the table, based on what we've seen in the opening weeks of the season, City have conceded 51 chances on their goal. Three wins in a row with 10 goals scored have made a big difference to the feeling around the MKM Stadium, both inside and out with players and fans having smiles as wide as the River Humber.

arts.ttl: Hull City injury latest as Tim Walter ponders Norwich City changes with Joao Pedro call
arts.sum: "Maybe, he was in full training, so maybe he can be or we are waiting until after the national break, but everything is possible, don't know at the moment," Walter said of the young defender. Elsewhere, the Tigers boss has been given a clean bill of health for the trip to Norfolk, with all those involved at Loftus Road on Tuesday night coming through without any issues, meaning only Dogukan Sinik, Ryan Longman, Andy Smith and young goalkeepers Thimothee Lo-Tutala and Harvey Cartwright are sidelined through injury.

arts.ttl: Norwich City closing in on bargain deal for former Bournemouth midfielder
arts.sum: Norwich City are closing in on a free transfer deal for former Bournemouth attacking midfielder Emiliano Marcondes, according… The post Norwich City closing in on bargain deal for former Bournemouth midfielder appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Marcondes close to Norwich deal - reports
arts.sum: Emiliano Marcondes is close to becoming a Norwich City player, according to reports from his native Denmark.
